Name: Época Porto
Tips: Nordic-organic sourdough plates. Arrive 08:15 to beat the queue.

Name: Hakko
Tips: Croissants + Turkish eggs. Copenhagen-style specialty coffee.

Name: Porto Cathedral (Sé)
Tips: 12th-century fortress church. Cloister azulejos and miradouro out back.

Name: Café Santiago
Tips: Most iconic francesinha in Porto. Arrive before noon to skip the line.

Name: Capela das Almas
Tips: Facade covered in 15,947 blue-and-white azulejo tiles.

Name: Palácio da Bolsa
Tips: Guided tour only. Salão Árabe took 18 years to complete.

Name: Centro Português de Fotografia
Tips: Former prison building; spy-camera collection, good for kids.

Name: Café da Porta do Olival
Tips: 1853 cafe hiding a stretch of the 14th-century Fernandina wall.

Name: Jardim das Virtudes
Tips: Terraced picnic gardens on the Douro hillside. Locals bring wine and blankets.

Name: Passeio das Virtudes
Tips: Faces west - Porto's best hidden sunset spot before the cruise.

Name: Porto 6 Bridges Sunset Cruise
Tips: 18:45 departure timed for sunset. Book online in advance.

Name: MUU
Tips: Contemporary Portuguese, dry-aged beef. Book 1-2 weeks ahead.

Name: Avenida dos Aliados
Tips: City hall and the grand boulevard, lit up at night.
